name: Engagement básico
description: Premia con 1 punto a los usuarios que apenas han interactuado con la tarea (≤ 2 mediciones acumuladas). Útil para incentivar a quien empieza.
blocklyXml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="gd_rule" id="rule_engagement" x="40" y="40"><value name="WHEN"><block type="gd_compare" id="cmp_engagement"><field name="OP"><=</field><value name="LEFT"><block type="gd_field" id="f_user_count"><field name="PATH">user.measurements_count</field></block></value><value name="RIGHT"><block type="gd_literal_number" id="lit_two"><field name="VALUE">2</field></block></value></block></value><statement name="THEN"><block type="gd_assign_points" id="assign_engagement"><value name="VALUE"><block type="gd_literal_number" id="lit_one"><field name="VALUE">1</field></block></value><field name="CASE_NAME">BasicEngagement</field></block></statement></block></xml>
